title: Anti-ordnance EM probe
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''anti-ordnance EM probe''' was an anti-missile weapon used by the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]]. When launched at incoming [[Missile/Legends|missiles]], the probe disrupted the electronic guidance signals of smart munitions in flight, causing them to crash and miss their intended target. The probes were modified into the [[ABX-110 Tube-Launched ABC Scrambler]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 1994-03-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 10: Bounty Hunters]]''
*<!-- 1997-09-XX -->''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]''
